overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a scenic riverbank during golden hour. The clip transitions from a brief village view to a tranquil waterfront path with snow-capped mountains in the distance, wildflower meadows, and ends at a wooden dock with a moored sailboat.

scene_state.functional_zone: village waterfront with wooden manor buildings

events.description: scene fades to black transitioning from village waterfront to riverside path

agents.ego_description: standing in shallow water at the village shore, facing the wooden manor buildings

entered.detail: large multi-story wooden building with red roof and multiple wings
calm water reflecting the golden sunset sky
tall stone tower attached to the manor structure

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with Geralt standing in shallow water at a village waterfront, facing a large wooden manor house with a stone watchtower. The scene is bathed in warm golden hour light before fading to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: open riverbank with distant mountain vista

events.description: begins walking along the sandy riverbank path away from the village
snow-capped mountain peak comes into full view across the river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sandy riverbank with the river on the left side, heading toward the distant mountain view

entered.detail: sandy and pebble shoreline along the water's edge
tall mountain with snow-covered summit visible across the river
dense line of trees marking the inland forest boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sandy riverbank path with the river on his left, moving away from the village. The landscape opens up to reveal a stunning snow-capped mountain across the water, with forests lining the right side of the path.

events.description: pauses to observe the mountain view, then turns around to walk back toward the village
enters area with dense wildflowers including red poppies and purple lupines

agents.ego_description: stops to look at the mountain vista across the river, then turns and walks back along the shore through fields of colorful wildflowers

entered.detail: clusters of bright red poppies growing along the path edge
tall purple lupine flowers in the foreground near the water
the wooden manor building reappears in the distance as Geralt walks back
the stone tower of the manor visible against the sky
weathered wooden posts marking the field boundary

segments.scene_description: After admiring the mountain view, Geralt turns and walks back toward the village. The river is now on his right as he passes through dense meadows filled with red poppies and purple lupines, with the manor house gradually coming back into view in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside dock with wooden manor and moored sailboat

events.description: approaches the wooden dock and moored sailboat near the manor house
slows slightly while approaching the sailboat and dock area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden dock and sailboat, approaching the manor house from the riverside path

entered.detail: wooden sailboat with large tan sail moored at the dock
wooden dock structure extending into the river water

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches the manor's riverside dock, passing close to a wooden sailboat moored at the pier. The wooden manor house and its stone watchtower loom larger on the left as he walks along the water's edge, with the river now close on his right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a village waterfront out into a vast river valley and back again under the warm glow of the golden hour. It begins with Geralt standing in shallow water facing a large wooden manor house and stone watchtower before the camera shifts to follow him along a sandy riverbank path. As he moves away from the village, the landscape opens up to reveal a stunning snow-capped mountain across the water and dense forests lining the trail. The scene then transitions as Geralt turns back toward the village, passing through vibrant meadows filled with red poppies and purple lupines while the manor house gradually reappears in the distance. Finally, the camera follows him as he approaches the riverside dock, passing a moored wooden sailboat with the manor and its watchtower looming large on the left.
